If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.16-4 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/81530 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** applausetester+ap3@applause.expensifail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Pull Request QA execution **Device used:** IPhone 11 /IOS 26.1 / Samsung a31 **App Component:** Other ## Action Performed: 1.Open the iOS hybrid app 2.Sign in to New Expensify (NewDot) 3.Open the Troubleshoot section 4.Tap Go to Old Expensify (OldDot) 5.In OldDot, open the hamburger menu 6.Tap Try the new Expensify 7.Observe the landing screen ## Expected Result: The user lands on Home in New Expensify after returning from OldDot. ## Actual Result: The app briefly freezes and then redirects the user to Troubleshoot instead of Home. After some time, the app becomes responsive again, but the navigation destination is incorrect. This is an issue because the PR intent is to ensure users remain on Home by default, avoiding legacy or technical routes such as Troubleshoot. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b1e868c8-bcd8-4f59-bc17-bb07ffab61e0 https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9d26db28-eb89-4b0f-8b97-9d7e0b20819b [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

title: [$250] Reduce forced focus mode switching

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

labels.name: Melvin Triage
labels.description: Automatic AI Analysis of an issue

body:
Slack Thread Context: https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C05LX9D6E07/p1771328820064029?thread_ts=1771328820.064029&cid=C05LX9D6E07 **What the problem is:** Users are being automatically switched into `#focus mode` (an unread-only filter) in a way that feels jarring and confusing, causing chats to “disappear” from the Inbox during normal navigation. **What the expected output is:** - Reduce accidental/over-eager auto-switching by basing the threshold on the number of reports visible in the user’s LHN (not total reports in Onyx), so fewer users are forced into the mode. **Debugging info:** - Reference: https://fsty.io/v/Cw5YnkdF - Current logic described: auto-switch triggers when a user has **20+ reports in Onyx**, rather than **20+ reports in LHN**. - Example mentioned: user had **6 reports in LHN** but still got switched. - User impact reported: confusion that chats disappear after clicking into them and then navigating elsewhere; consistent negative feedback. **Potential solutions or implementation notes (if applicable):** - First step agreed: change threshold calculation to use **LHN report count** instead of **Onyx report count**.
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @ShridharGoel

  • Upwork Job URL: https://www.upwork.com/jobs/~022028892030546284710
  • Upwork Job ID: 2028892030546284710
  • Last Price Increase: 2026-03-03

body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.28-1 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/83517 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** applausetester+rg_46@applause.expensifail.com applausetester+piyozx@applause.expensifail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Pull Request QA execution **Device used:** Windows 11 / Chrome **App Component:** Money Requests ## Action Performed: Preconditions: Logged in as applausetester+piyozx@applause.expensifail.com (Admin of WS) and applausetester+rg_46@applause.expensifail.com (member of WS) in two different environment (can be in incognito) 1. (Member) navigate to workspace chat that the Admin of WS is applausetester+piyozx@applause.expensifail.com 2. (Member) create a report and add an expense to the report 3. (Member) click submit on the expense preview 4. (Member) open the expense details 5. (Member) Verify that a message shows in the report history saying "failed to submit the report. Add at least one approver as an expense description" and that the "actor" of the message is yourself 6. (Member) Navigate to report tab, click on the expense that just created and fill the description of the expense with "applausetester+piyozx@applause.expensifail.com" (that is the admin of the workspace) 6. (Member) Rename the report to "AUTOAPPROVE_ERROR" 7. (Member) Click the submit button again 8. (Member) Rename the report to APPROVE_ERROR 9. (Admin) Navigate to the member's expense workspace chat 10. (Admin) Approve the report on the expense preview and open the expense details ## Expected Result: - in step 7, there should be two report action message from Concierge (1. "report routed to applausetester+piyozx@applaise.expensifail.com due to custom approval workflow" 2. "failed to approve via workspace rules. This report cannot be approved") - in step 10, the expense can't be approved and there's a report action saying from the admin "failed to approve. This report cannot be approved" ## Actual Result: - in step 7, only the first report action message from Concierge displayed - in step 10, the expense can be approved and there's no report action saying from the admin ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/4f2f219d-bcad-4376-a98f-b849ed623738 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

Go to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Go to workspace chat. 3. Create an expense. 4. Open the report. 5. Click Submit. 6. Click description, enter applausetester+ndk80@applause.expensifail.com and save it. 7. Rename report to APPROVE_ERROR. 8. Click Submit. 9. Click Approve. 10. Right click on "failed to submit the report. Add at least one approver as an expense description" system message > Copy to clipboard. 11. Paste the content. 12. Right click on "failed to approve. If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.28-1 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** N/A - new feature, doesn't exist in prod **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/74967 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** isodjnosidjiojiojiso@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Exploratory - Significant User Experience Deterioration **Device used:** Mac 26.2 / Chrome **App Component:** Money Requests ## Action Performed: Precondition: - Enable distance rates. - Change distance unit to Kilometers. 1. Go to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Go to self DM. 3. Click + > Track distance > Manual. 4. Enter amount > Next. 5. Click Create expense. 6. Open the expense. 7. Click Distance field. ## Expected Result: In Step 3 and 4, when creating distance expense, distance unit should default to kilometer (from the changes in precondition). ## Actual Result: In Step 3 and 4, when creating distance expense, old distance unit (mile) persists. In Step 6, after creating the expense, the distance amount persists but with the different unit (kilometer). In Step 7, distance editor still shows miles when the menu item shows kilometers. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [x] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [x] iOS: mWeb Safari - [x] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/65fa4757-a7b0-4614-bf99-b245655385ed [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

Navigate to Self DM and open report again. 10. body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.28-1 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** N/A - new feature, doesn't exist in prod **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/74967 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** sjiondsjndosijdonijso@gmaal.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Exploratory - Significant User Experience Deterioration **Device used:** Mac 26.2 / Chrome **App Component:** Money Requests ## Action Performed: Precondition: - Enable Taxes and Distance rates. - Add two tax rates - 5% and 10 %. - Add a new distance rates - 1.00 / mile. - Enable Track tax in Distance rates settings. - Assign 5% tax rate to 0.725 / mile (default rate) with any tax reclaimable amount. - Assign 10% tax rate to 1.00 / mile with any tax reclaimable amount. 1. Go to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Go to self DM. 3. Create a manual distance expense with the default distance rate (0,725 / mile). 4. Click Submit it to someone. 5. Select workspace chat. 6. On confirm page, click Rate. 7. Select another rate (1.00 / mile). 8. If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.28-0 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** N/A - new feature, doesn't exist in prod **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/74967 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** isodjnosidjiojiojiso@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Exploratory - Significant User Experience Deterioration **Device used:** Mac 26.2 / Chrome **App Component:** Money Requests ## Action Performed: Precondition: - Workspace has at least two distance rates. 1. Go to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Go to self DM. 3. Create a manual distance expense with 10 miles. 4. Open the expense. → Header shows amount for 10.00 mi @ rate. 5. Click Rate and select another rate. ## Expected Result: Distance on the report header will show 10.00 mi. ## Actual Result: Distance on the report header changes from 10.00 mi to 10 mi after changing rate. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c067e7c3-e4bf-41d8-a855-58d9318bf832 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.28-0 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** N/A - new feature, doesn't exist in prod **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/81883 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** isodjnosidjiojiojiso@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Exploratory - Significant User Experience Deterioration **Device used:** Mac 26.2 / Chrome **App Component:** Money Requests ## Action Performed: Precondition: - Workspace has at least two distance rates. 1. Go to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Go to self DM. 3. Create a manual distance expense. 4. Open the expense. 5. Go offline. 6. Click Rate and select another rate. 7. Go back to self DM. 8. Click Submit it to someone. 9. Select workspace chat. 10. On confirm page, go online. ## Expected Result: To field on confirm page will not change after returning online. ## Actual Result: To field on confirm page changes to self DM. Amount is flipped. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fab12afb-785a-49cc-a994-c5c1852390b4 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

Select any user > Save. ## Expected Result: Filter will be applied. ## Actual Result: Filter is not applied. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8be085a2-f4a3-42e4-b46e-42761829c566 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
